channel.title: Posts on SiuHui
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on SiuHui

item.title: About
item.description: I aim to use this blog to record my life journey related to studying. Despite not being a native English speaker, I’ve chosen to write my blog in English. Thus, I hope this will help me enhance my language skills and open doors to a world of broader knowledge. As a self-learning enthusiast, I aspire to acquire knowledge for its inherent value. I have to remind myself not to learn solely for grades, not to compare with others, to be true to myself and that what I can do matters more.
